ucs.title: [LLM] APT40 (Leviathan/MUDCARP) web-shell follow-on recon from IIS/Exchange/Tomcat worker processes
ucs.description: Hunts the post-exploitation hand-off characteristic of Leviathan after they weaponize edge appliances and Exchange (ProxyLogon CVE-2021-26855, Citrix NetScaler CVE-2019-19781, F5 BIG-IP CVE-2020-5902, Fortinet CVE-2018-13379 — all called out in CISA AA21-200A): a web-server worker process (w3wp.exe / UMWorkerProcess.exe / httpd / tomcat) spawns Windows recon LOLBins via a China Chopper- or Antsword-style web shell. This is the T1190 → T1505.003 → T1059 chain APT40 has run against US, AU, UK and EU defense/maritime/biomedical victims since 2017.
ucs.splunk: | tstats summariesonly=false count min(_time) as firstTime max(_time) as lastTime from datamodel=Endpoint.Processes where Processes.parent_process_name IN ("w3wp.exe","httpd.exe","tomcat.exe","tomcat9.exe","nginx.exe","UMWorkerProcess.exe","MSExchangeMailboxAssistants.exe","MSExchangeFrontendTransport.exe") AND Processes.process_name IN ("cmd.exe","powershell.exe","pwsh.exe","whoami.exe","net.exe","net1.exe","ipconfig.exe","systeminfo.exe","tasklist.exe","quser.exe","arp.exe","nltest.exe","wmic.exe","schtasks.exe","reg.exe","nbtstat.exe","hostname.exe","ping.exe","netstat.exe","dsquery.exe","csvde.exe") by Processes.dest Processes.user Processes.parent_process_name Processes.parent_process Processes.process_name Processes.process Processes.process_hash | `drop_dm_object_name(Processes)` | rex field=parent_process "(?i)(?<app_pool>w3wp\.exe.*-ap\s+\"[^\"]+\")" | eval recon_tokens=if(match(process,"(?i)(whoami|net\s+(user|group|localgroup|view|use)|ipconfig|systeminfo|tasklist|nltest|quser|arp|nbtstat|netstat\s+-an|dsquery|hostname|ping)"),1,0) | stats count min(firstTime) as firstTime max(lastTime) as lastTime values(process_name) as process_names values(process) as cmdlines sum(recon_tokens) as recon_tokens_sum by dest user parent_process_name | where recon_tokens_sum>=1 OR mvcount(process_names)>=2 | convert ctime(firstTime) ctime(lastTime) | sort - lastTime
ucs.kql:
// APT40 / Leviathan web-shell post-exploitation recon chain
// Catches China Chopper / Antsword / .NET Exchange shell hand-off after edge-appliance exploit
let LookbackDays = 7d;
let WebWorkers = dynamic(["w3wp.exe","httpd.exe","tomcat.exe","tomcat9.exe","tomcat10.exe","nginx.exe","UMWorkerProcess.exe","MSExchangeMailboxAssistants.exe","MSExchangeFrontendTransport.exe"]);
let ReconBins = dynamic(["whoami.exe","net.exe","net1.exe","ipconfig.exe","systeminfo.exe","tasklist.exe","quser.exe","arp.exe","nltest.exe","wmic.exe","schtasks.exe","reg.exe","nbtstat.exe","hostname.exe","ping.exe","netstat.exe","dsquery.exe"]);
let Shells = dynamic(["cmd.exe","powershell.exe","pwsh.exe"]);
DeviceProcessEvents
| where Timestamp > ago(LookbackDays)
| where InitiatingProcessFileName in~ (WebWorkers)
| where FileName in~ (ReconBins) or FileName in~ (Shells)
// shell-only is noise; require recon vocabulary in the cmdline when shell is the child
| where FileName in~ (ReconBins)
   or (FileName in~ (Shells)
       and ProcessCommandLine has_any ("whoami","net user","net group","net localgroup","net view","net use","ipconfig /all","systeminfo","tasklist","quser","nltest","netstat -an","dsquery","hostname","reg query","schtasks /query"))
// don't filter on `AccountName !endswith "$"` — IIS app pools run as service / IUSR / NETWORK SERVICE
| project Timestamp, DeviceName, AccountName, AccountDomain,
          ParentImage   = InitiatingProcessFolderPath,
          ParentCmd     = InitiatingProcessCommandLine,
          ChildImage    = FolderPath,
          ChildCmd      = ProcessCommandLine,
          ChildSHA256   = SHA256,
          IsRemoteSession = AdditionalFields
| summarize Hits = count(),
            FirstSeen = min(Timestamp),
            LastSeen  = max(Timestamp),
            ChildBins = make_set(ChildImage, 25),
            CmdSamples = make_set(ChildCmd, 25)
            by DeviceName, AccountName, ParentImage
| where Hits >= 2 or array_length(ChildBins) >= 2  // single curious whoami is benign; chain is not
| order by LastSeen desc
ucs.sentinel_kql:
// APT40 / Leviathan web-shell post-exploitation recon — Sentinel SecurityEvent 4688
let LookbackDays = 7d;
let WebWorkers = dynamic(["w3wp.exe","httpd.exe","tomcat.exe","tomcat9.exe","tomcat10.exe","nginx.exe","UMWorkerProcess.exe","MSExchangeMailboxAssistants.exe","MSExchangeFrontendTransport.exe"]);
let ReconBins = dynamic(["whoami.exe","net.exe","net1.exe","ipconfig.exe","systeminfo.exe","tasklist.exe","quser.exe","arp.exe","nltest.exe","wmic.exe","schtasks.exe","reg.exe","nbtstat.exe","hostname.exe","ping.exe","netstat.exe","dsquery.exe"]);
SecurityEvent
| where TimeGenerated > ago(LookbackDays)
| where EventID == 4688
| extend ParentBin = tolower(tostring(split(ParentProcessName, "\\")[-1])),
         ChildBin  = tolower(tostring(split(NewProcessName,    "\\")[-1]))
| where ParentBin in (WebWorkers)
| where ChildBin in (ReconBins)
   or (ChildBin in ("cmd.exe","powershell.exe","pwsh.exe")
       and CommandLine has_any ("whoami","net user","net group","net localgroup","net view","net use","ipconfig /all","systeminfo","tasklist","quser","nltest","netstat -an","dsquery","hostname","reg query","schtasks /query"))
| summarize Hits = count(),
            FirstSeen = min(TimeGenerated),
            LastSeen  = max(TimeGenerated),
            ChildBins = make_set(ChildBin, 25),
            CmdSamples = make_set(CommandLine, 25)
            by Computer, Account, ParentBin
| where Hits >= 2 or array_length(ChildBins) >= 2
| order by LastSeen desc
ucs.sigma_yaml:
title: APT40 (Leviathan) Web-Shell Recon Hand-off from IIS/Exchange/Tomcat Worker
id: 7c4d2a91-leviathan-webshell-recon-chain
status: experimental
description: Detects China Chopper / Antsword / Exchange .aspx web-shell follow-on activity attributed to APT40 (Leviathan, MUDCARP, BRONZE MOHAWK), where a web-server worker process spawns a Windows recon LOLBin or shell with discovery vocabulary.
references:
  - https://www.cisa.gov/news-events/cybersecurity-advisories/aa21-200a
  - https://attack.mitre.org/groups/G0065/
author: detection-engineering
date: 2026/05/05
tags:
  - attack.initial_access
  - attack.t1190
  - attack.persistence
  - attack.t1505.003
  - attack.execution
  - attack.t1059.001
  - attack.t1059.003
  - attack.discovery
  - attack.t1087
  - attack.t1018
  - actor.apt40
  - actor.leviathan
logsource:
  category: process_creation
  product: windows
detection:
  selection_parent:
    ParentImage|endswith:
      - '\w3wp.exe'
      - '\httpd.exe'
      - '\tomcat.exe'
      - '\tomcat9.exe'
      - '\nginx.exe'
      - '\UMWorkerProcess.exe'
      - '\MSExchangeMailboxAssistants.exe'
      - '\MSExchangeFrontendTransport.exe'
  selection_recon_bin:
    Image|endswith:
      - '\whoami.exe'
      - '\net.exe'
      - '\net1.exe'
      - '\ipconfig.exe'
      - '\systeminfo.exe'
      - '\tasklist.exe'
      - '\quser.exe'
      - '\nltest.exe'
      - '\dsquery.exe'
      - '\nbtstat.exe'
      - '\hostname.exe'
      - '\arp.exe'
  selection_shell_with_recon:
    Image|endswith:
      - '\cmd.exe'
      - '\powershell.exe'
      - '\pwsh.exe'
    CommandLine|contains:
      - 'whoami'
      - 'net user'
      - 'net group'
      - 'net localgroup'
      - 'net view'
      - 'ipconfig /all'
      - 'systeminfo'
      - 'nltest'
      - 'netstat -an'
      - 'dsquery'
      - 'reg query'
      - 'schtasks /query'
  condition: selection_parent and (selection_recon_bin or selection_shell_with_recon)
fields:
  - Computer
  - User
  - ParentImage
  - Image
  - CommandLine
falsepositives:
  - Vulnerability scanner agents that legitimately enumerate from web-server context
  - SCCM / monitoring scripts invoked by the app pool identity
level: high
ucs.rationale: APT40 is publicly burned (CISA/FBI/NCSC/ACSC AA21-200A, DOJ Sep-2021 indictment of Hainan SSD officers) for chaining edge-CVE exploitation → China Chopper-style shell on the web/Exchange tier → hands-on-keyboard recon. The detection refuses to alert on a bare web-worker spawning a shell (legit deployments do this) — it requires either a Windows recon LOLBin as the direct child, or shell+recon-voca
_sigma_issues: sigma parse error: Sigma rule identifier must be an UUID

ucs.title: [LLM] APT40 LSASS credential theft via ProcDump / comsvcs.dll MiniDump after edge-appliance compromise
ucs.description: Targets Leviathan's documented post-foothold credential-access tradecraft: dropping ProcDump (often renamed) or invoking the built-in comsvcs.dll MiniDump export via rundll32 against lsass.exe to obtain hashes/tickets for lateral movement to maritime/defense AD assets. APT40 has been observed by Mandiant (TEMP.Periscope) and CrowdStrike (Kryptonite Panda) running this exact sequence after web-shell-mediated entry.
ucs.splunk: | tstats summariesonly=false count min(_time) as firstTime max(_time) as lastTime from datamodel=Endpoint.Processes where (Processes.process="*lsass*" AND (Processes.process="*-ma*" OR Processes.process="*-mp*" OR Processes.process="*MiniDump*")) OR (Processes.process_name="rundll32.exe" AND Processes.process="*comsvcs*" AND Processes.process="*#-?24*") OR (Processes.process_name IN ("procdump.exe","procdump64.exe")) by Processes.dest Processes.user Processes.parent_process_name Processes.parent_process Processes.process_name Processes.process Processes.process_hash Processes.original_file_name | `drop_dm_object_name(Processes)` | eval procdump_renamed=if((original_file_name IN ("procdump","procdump.exe","procdump64.exe") AND NOT match(process_name,"(?i)^procdump(64)?\.exe$")),1,0) | eval lsass_dump=if(match(process,"(?i)lsass") AND match(process,"(?i)(\-ma\b|\-mp\b|MiniDump)"),1,0) | eval comsvcs_minidump=if(match(process_name,"(?i)rundll32\.exe") AND match(process,"(?i)comsvcs(\.dll)?\s*,\s*#?\-?24"),1,0) | where procdump_renamed=1 OR lsass_dump=1 OR comsvcs_minidump=1 | stats count min(firstTime) as firstTime max(lastTime) as lastTime values(process_name) as process_names values(process) as cmdlines values(parent_process_name) as parents by dest user | convert ctime(firstTime) ctime(lastTime) | sort - lastTime
ucs.kql:
// APT40 / Leviathan LSASS credential dumping — ProcDump (incl. renamed) or comsvcs.dll MiniDump
let LookbackDays = 14d;
DeviceProcessEvents
| where Timestamp > ago(LookbackDays)
| where
    // ProcDump targeting lsass — covers psexec-deployed and renamed variants APT40 favours
    (ProcessCommandLine has "lsass"
        and ProcessCommandLine has_any (" -ma ", " -mp ", " /ma ", " /mp ", "MiniDump"))
    // Built-in LOLBin — rundll32.exe comsvcs.dll,MiniDump <pid> <path> full
    or (FileName =~ "rundll32.exe"
        and ProcessCommandLine has "comsvcs"
        and ProcessCommandLine matches regex @"(?i)comsvcs(\.dll)?\s*,\s*#?\-?24\b")
    // ProcDump signature even when renamed (PE original-filename leaks through)
    or (ProcessVersionInfoOriginalFileName in~ ("procdump","procdump.exe","procdump64.exe")
        and FileName !in~ ("procdump.exe","procdump64.exe"))
| where AccountName !endswith "$"
   or InitiatingProcessFileName in~ ("w3wp.exe","UMWorkerProcess.exe","httpd.exe","tomcat.exe","nginx.exe")  // KEEP if web-shell-spawned
| project Timestamp, DeviceName, AccountName, AccountDomain,
          FileName, ProcessVersionInfoOriginalFileName,
          ProcessCommandLine, FolderPath, SHA256,
          ParentImage = InitiatingProcessFolderPath,
          ParentCmd   = InitiatingProcessCommandLine,
          ParentName  = InitiatingProcessFileName
| order by Timestamp desc
ucs.sentinel_kql:
// APT40 LSASS credential dumping — ProcDump (incl. renamed) or comsvcs MiniDump (Sentinel SecurityEvent 4688)
let LookbackDays = 14d;
SecurityEvent
| where TimeGenerated > ago(LookbackDays)
| where EventID == 4688
| extend ChildBin = tolower(tostring(split(NewProcessName, "\\")[-1])),
         ParentBin = tolower(tostring(split(ParentProcessName, "\\")[-1])),
         CmdLower = tolower(CommandLine)
| where
    (CmdLower has "lsass"
        and (CmdLower has " -ma " or CmdLower has " -mp " or CmdLower has " /ma " or CmdLower has " /mp " or CmdLower has "minidump"))
    or (ChildBin == "rundll32.exe"
        and CmdLower has "comsvcs"
        and CommandLine matches regex @"(?i)comsvcs(\.dll)?\s*,\s*#?\-?24\b")
    or ChildBin in ("procdump.exe","procdump64.exe")
| where Account !endswith "$"
   or ParentBin in ("w3wp.exe","umworkerprocess.exe","httpd.exe","tomcat.exe","nginx.exe")
| project TimeGenerated, Computer, Account, ChildBin, ParentBin,
          CommandLine, NewProcessName, ParentProcessName, TokenElevationType
| order by TimeGenerated desc
ucs.sigma_yaml:
title: APT40 (Leviathan) LSASS Memory Dump via ProcDump or comsvcs.dll MiniDump
id: f1b5e3c4-leviathan-lsass-procdump-comsvcs
status: experimental
description: Detects APT40 (Leviathan / MUDCARP / TEMP.Periscope) LSASS credential dumping using ProcDump (including renamed binaries detected via PE OriginalFileName) or the built-in comsvcs.dll MiniDump export proxied through rundll32.
references:
  - https://www.cisa.gov/news-events/cybersecurity-advisories/aa21-200a
  - https://attack.mitre.org/groups/G0065/
  - https://www.justice.gov/opa/pr/four-chinese-nationals-working-ministry-state-security-charged-global-computer-intrusion
author: detection-engineering
date: 2026/05/05
tags:
  - attack.credential_access
  - attack.t1003.001
  - attack.defense_evasion
  - attack.t1218.011
  - attack.t1036.005
  - actor.apt40
  - actor.leviathan
logsource:
  category: process_creation
  product: windows
detection:
  selection_procdump_lsass:
    CommandLine|contains|all:
      - 'lsass'
    CommandLine|contains:
      - ' -ma '
      - ' -mp '
      - ' /ma '
      - ' /mp '
      - 'MiniDump'
  selection_comsvcs_minidump:
    Image|endswith: '\rundll32.exe'
    CommandLine|contains: 'comsvcs'
    CommandLine|re: '(?i)comsvcs(\.dll)?\s*,\s*#?\-?24\b'
  selection_procdump_renamed:
    OriginalFileName:
      - 'procdump'
      - 'procdump.exe'
      - 'procdump64.exe'
    Image|endswith:
      - '\procdump.exe'
      - '\procdump64.exe'
  filter_legit_named:
    Image|endswith:
      - '\procdump.exe'
      - '\procdump64.exe'
  condition: selection_procdump_lsass or selection_comsvcs_minidump or (selection_procdump_renamed and not filter_legit_named)
fields:
  - Computer
  - User
  - Image
  - OriginalFileName
  - CommandLine
  - ParentImage
falsepositives:
  - Authorized incident-response sweeps using Sysinternals ProcDump
  - Microsoft support engagements collecting LSASS dumps for tickets
level: high
ucs.rationale: Three signals fused into one detection: (a) any cmdline-string targeting lsass with ProcDump's -ma/-mp flags, (b) the LOLBAS-canonical rundll32 → comsvcs.dll,MiniDump (ordinal #-24) pattern, and (c) PE OriginalFileName==procdump on a binary not actually named procdump.exe — which catches the rename-evasion APT40 has been documented using. Web-worker parent (w3wp.exe / UMWorkerProcess.exe / tomcat)
_sigma_issues: sigma parse error: Sigma rule identifier must be an UUID
